decisions.name: Set_Overall_DCA_RAG_Rating_Final_Mark
decisions.label: Set Overall DCA RAG Rating & Final Mark?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Do not set RAG & Final Mark

decisions.name: Set_Overall_DQA_RAG_Rating_Final_Mark
decisions.label: Set Overall DQA RAG Rating & Final Mark?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Do not set RAG & Final Mark

decisions.name: Set_Overall_Performance_RAG_Rating_Final_Mark
decisions.label: Set Overall Performance RAG Rating & Final Mark
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Do not set RAG & Final Mark

Flow.description:
- Sets the Overall DQA RAG Rating and Final Mark for a Funding Award Performance Management Record when all category pick-lists have been completed.
- Sets the Overall DCA RAG Rating and Final Mark for a Funding Award Performance Management Record when all RAG Rating pick-lists have been completed.
- Sets the Overall Performance Management RAG Rating and Final Mark for a Funding Award Performance Management Record when all RAG Rating pick-lists have been completed.
Flow.label: GMS - Overall RAG Rating and Final Mark for Funding Award Performance Management
